subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath subdued the world through His Most Great Name, and verily, when He established Himself upon the dust, He was indeed the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی سخر العالم باسمه الاعظم و انه اذ استوی علی التراب انه لهو العرش
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
